title: Internal error in static function if a loop variable is initialized in the loop

features.name: static function with for loop inline variable initialization
features.description: Code should include a static function containing a for loop where the loop variable is initialized in the loop header, and the loop variable is referenced inside the loop body
features.snippet: function static void f(); for (int i=0; i<1; ++i) begin int v = i; end endfunction

features.name: loop variable declared outside for loop workaround
features.description: Code should include a static function where the loop variable is declared outside the for loop and then used in the loop header initialization as a workaround for the inline declaration bug
features.snippet: function static void f(); int i; for (i=0; i<1; ++i) begin int v = i; end endfunction
